why: Index must reflect the latest content after edits

output.console: Index rebuild result with entry count and duration

success_handling.criteria: Index build flow completes and the updated entry metadata is reflected in the rebuilt index

event.message: Knowledge index rebuilt with updated entry

error_handling.criteria: The knowledge-index-build flow returns an error or does not complete
error_handling.action: Log index build failure as warning, the edit is persisted but search may return stale metadata until next rebuild

event.message: Index rebuild failed after editing entry {entry_id}

decisions.outcome: Log warning, edit still considered successful — index will rebuild on next trigger
